settings.title: Book Your Spring Checkup Before the Summer Rush
settings.excerpt: May and June are our busiest months, so an April booking gets you the appointment time you actually want.
settings.body:
Every year the same thing happens. People remember their checkup in late June, just as families try to sort their teeth before the summer holidays, and the diary is already full.

If you are due, now is the easy time. A spring slot means more choice of times and no scramble before you travel.

It is also a good moment to catch small problems while they are still small. A tiny cavity found in April is a quick filling. Left until autumn it can become something larger.

Call the front desk or book online and we will find you a time that works.
